name: Oven "Fried" Scallops
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces Sea scallops, cut into quarters
1/3 cup plus 2 teaspoons seasoned dried-bread crumbs or seasoned crushed corn flake crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°C (500°F). Spray a baking sheet with nonstick spray and set aside.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, combine scallops and buttermilk, gently stirring to coat. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes to marinate.
3. In a small mixing bowl, combine the bread crumbs (or corn flake crumbs) and thyme. Dredge each scallop in the crumb mixture, coating both sides. Arrange scallops on the baking sheet.
4. Carefully turn the scallops over using tongs or a spatula, and bake until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Each serving provides: 3 proteins, 1/2 bread, 5 optional calories
Per serving: 139 calories
